prompts.global_base: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
prompts.scene_base: concrete subject first, preserve what the thing is, simplify without abstracting away identity, let one wrong condition carry the image
prompts.shorts_scene_base: portrait beat plate for vertical shorts, readable subject scale, concrete subject first, stillness over action, one anomaly only
prompts.packaging_base: minimal-surreal packaging plate, high small-size clarity, one dominant anchor subject or scene state, reduction without forced emptiness
prompts.thumbnail_base: landscape packaging plate, broad readable silhouette, one dominant anchor subject or scene state, avoid clutter
prompts.shorts_base: portrait packaging plate, readable dominant anchor, controlled reduction, calm frame, no forced empty thirds
prompts.refine_base: preserve subject identity, preserve the dominant anomaly, add clarity without adding poster graphics, clutter, or realism drift
prompts.final_base: canonical final deliverable, preserve the dominant read, preserve the dominant anomaly, preserve palette control, preserve clarity without reintroducing clutter
